concept: Craft me a game where I control a character who can temporarily transform into any inanimate object they've previously touched. As a chair, I might blend into a room to avoid detection; as a ball, I could bounce to reach high places; as a key, I could unlock doors. Each transformation maintains a hint of human characteristics, potentially alerting observant enemies to my disguise. The narrative explores themes of identity as my character questions whether they're still human after spending too much time as objects.
